Package org.finos.fluxnova.spin.impl.logging

Class SpinCoreLogger

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.commons.logging.BaseLogger
org.finos.fluxnova.spin.impl.logging.SpinLogger
org.finos.fluxnova.spin.impl.logging.SpinCoreLogger
public class SpinCoreLogger extends SpinLogger
The Logger for the core api.
Author:
Daniel Meyer, Sebastian Menski
